title: Industrial Curvy Pipes
description: texture pack that replaces the boring textures of curvy pipes to a more industrial look
body:
This texture pack replaces the standard, monotonous textures of curvy pipes with a more detailed, industrial-inspired design. Whether you're creating a factory setting, a futuristic environment, or just want to add some grit and realism to your build, this texture pack brings an industrial edge to your world. The enhanced textures add depth and character to otherwise simple and unremarkable pipes, making them stand out as intricate, functional elements in any setting.

Curvy Pipes by cyb0124
